basis.zh: 模型按竞彩日归档、按官方开赛时间排序；综合官方 SP/让球 SP/赔率快照、Elo、近一年赛果攻防、赛程密度、Poisson 比分分布与赛前信息层。推荐分为主推候选、价值观察、观察和避坑，低赔强队必须通过让球盘与概率双重校验。
basis.en: Schedules are grouped by Sporttery day and sorted by official kickoff time. The model combines official SP/handicap SP/snapshots, Elo, last-year form, schedule density, Poisson score distribution, and pre-match signal layers. Picks are split into main candidates, value-watch, watch, and avoid; low-SP favourites must pass both handicap and probability checks.

calibration.zh: 当前为轻量级赛前校准：已加入历史 form 修正和近期命中率冷却；后续仍需要用时间滚动回测做 Brier / log loss / reliability 正式校准。
calibration.en: This is a lightweight pre-match calibration with rolling-form correction and recent hit-rate cooldown; Brier, log loss, and reliability calibration are still needed.

tipLabel.zh: 观察为主 胜平负不强推

explanation.zh: 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负条件未齐：低赔、平局压力、让球确认或风险标签存在不一致，只保留为赛前观察项。
explanation.en: This 1X2 market did not pass the recommendation gate. Low odds, draw pressure, handicap confirmation, or risk tags are not aligned, so it remains watch-only.

analysisItems.zh: 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负 SP：主胜 1.14 / 平局 5.85 / 客胜 12.50；去水支持率约 主胜 78% / 平局 15% / 客胜 7%。
analysisItems.en: official Sporttery HAD SP: 1.14 / 5.85 / 12.50; normalized support is about home 78% / draw 15% / away 7%.

analysisItems.zh: 观察理由：模型优势约 24 个百分点，市场优势约 63 个百分点，让球同向支持约 33%；条件没有同时闭合，暂不输出单一胜平负方向。
analysisItems.en: Watch reason: model edge is about 24 points, market edge about 63 points, same-side handicap support about 33%; no single 1X2 pick is promoted.

analysisItems.zh: 平局支持率未明显压低主方向，但仍需留意赛前 SP 变化。 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负 SP 来自本次中国竞彩网同步快照。
analysisItems.en: Draw support is not dominant, but late SP movement still matters. official Sporttery HAD SP came from this Sporttery sync snapshot.

tipLabel.zh: 观察为主 进球数不强推

explanation.zh: 进球趋势条件未齐：总进球期望约 2.93，大 2.5 概率约 52%，边际不足时不强行给大/小球方向。
explanation.en: The goals trend did not pass the recommendation gate. Total expected goals are about 2.93, over 2.5 probability about 52%, so no over/under pick is promoted.

analysisItems.zh: 比分热区：2-0 附近；候选方向 大2.5球（≥3球） 的模型概率约 52%，低于强推阈值。
analysisItems.en: Score heat zone: around 2-0; candidate Over 2.5 goals is about 52%, below the promotion threshold.

analysisItems.zh: 大 2.5 球概率约 52%，该指标用于走势参考，不等同于官方总进球 SP。
analysisItems.en: Over 2.5 probability is about 52%. This is a model reference, not official Sporttery total-goals SP.

tipLabel.zh: 观察为主 条件未齐

explanation.zh: 这场先不把主胜 荷兰包装成高可信。HAD 方向虽然清楚，但让球同向支持约 33%，盘口确认不够完整。
explanation.en: This is not packaged as high confidence. Home Win (荷兰) leads the HAD read, but same-side handicap support is about 33%, so confirmation is incomplete.

analysisItems.zh: 降级原因：模型首选优势约 24 个百分点，未达到强推荐阈值；市场主线领先约 63 个百分点。
analysisItems.en: Downgrade reason: model edge is about 24 points, below the strong-pick threshold; market lead is about 63 points.

analysisItems.zh: 进球侧：比分热区 2-0，总期望 2.93，大 2.5 约 52%，双方进球约 48%。
analysisItems.en: Goals: score heat zone 2-0, total xG 2.93, over 2.5 about 52%, BTTS about 48%.

analysisItems.zh: 临场复核：热门过热、国际赛低赔、让球支持不足、进球临界。如果赛前 SP 继续降赔但让球支持不上来，仍按观察处理。
analysisItems.en: Late check: Heavy favorite, International low-SP favorite, Handicap support weak, Goal-model borderline. If SP shortens without handicap confirmation, keep this as watch-only.

dataPolicy.zh: 赛前分析综合官方 HAD/HHAD SP、SP 走势、Elo 强度、近一年攻防样本、赛程密度、比分分布与公开赛前信息层；伤停、首发、天气、裁判、xG/xGA 与外部赔率会按可验证程度进入辅助判断。
dataPolicy.en: Pre-match reads combine official HAD/HHAD SP, SP movement, Elo strength, last-year form, schedule density, score distribution, and public pre-match signal layers. Injuries, lineups, weather, referees, xG/xGA, and external odds are folded in as verified auxiliary inputs.

outputSections.zh: 六、伤停与首发阵容分析
七、战术风格与克制关系分析
八、赛程体能与战意分析
十、天气、场地与裁判因素
十二、综合判断与预测结论

zh: 先输出胜平负、比分分布、大小球、双方进球和让球概率，不把任务简化成只猜胜负。
官方 SP 去水概率是最低基准，Elo 强度、Poisson 比分模型、近一年攻防和赛程密度只在赛前可得时参与集成。
推荐阈值跟随 model-calibration 动态变化；低命中联赛、市场或方向自动降权并提高概率差与让球支持要求。
回测必须按时间滚动，严禁赛后 xG、赛后射门、最终排名、未公开首发或时间点不一致的临场赔率泄漏。
评估以 log loss、Brier score、校准误差和分桶可靠性为主，命中率只作为辅助观察。
en: Output 1X2, score distribution, totals, BTTS, and handicap probabilities first instead of reducing the task to one winner.
Official de-vigged SP is the baseline; Elo, Poisson score modelling, last-year attack/defense form, and schedule density enter only when available before kickoff.
Recommendation gates follow model-calibration dynamically; cold leagues, markets, or directions are down-weighted with higher probability-gap and handicap-support requirements.
Backtests must be time-ordered and must not leak post-match xG, post-match shots, final table rank, unpublished lineups, or late odds into earlier forecast nodes.
Evaluate with log loss, Brier score, calibration error, and bucket reliability; hit rate is only a secondary diagnostic.

forecastTargets.zh: 胜平负：主胜、平局、客胜三项概率
比分分布：2-3 个最高概率比分
大小球：大/小 2.5 概率
双方进球：BTTS Yes/No 概率
让球概率：当前官方让球线支持率
forecastTargets.en: Handicap: support at the current official line

modelingStack.zh: 赔率基准：官方 SP 去水隐含概率
modelingStack.en: Market baseline: de-vigged official SP probabilities

modelingStack.zh: Elo/Glicko 强度：球队动态评分、主场优势和强弱差
modelingStack.en: Elo/Glicko strength: dynamic rating, home advantage, team gap

modelingStack.zh: Poisson/Dixon-Coles：进球期望、比分矩阵、大小球和让球聚合
modelingStack.en: Poisson/Dixon-Coles: goal expectations, score matrix, totals, handicap aggregation

modelingStack.zh: 机器学习层：仅在基准稳定并完成时间滚动回测后加入
modelingStack.en: ML layer: added only after stable baselines and time-ordered backtests

modelingStack.zh: 集成层：用滚动验证集优化 market/Elo/Poisson/ML 权重
modelingStack.en: Ensemble: optimize market/Elo/Poisson/ML weights on rolling validation

modelingStack.zh: 校准层：可靠性曲线、Platt、isotonic、联赛和赔率分桶
modelingStack.en: Calibration: reliability curves, Platt, isotonic, league and odds buckets

zh: 必须输出概率，而不是只输出胜负结论。
必须按时间滚动回测，不能随机切分。
必须校准概率，并按联赛、场景和赔率区间分桶评估。
必须避免未来信息泄漏。
必须长期接近或优于简单赔率基准，否则不升格为推荐。
必须保留赛前快照，赛后只结算和复盘，不改写原方向。
en: Output probabilities, not just a winner.
Use time-ordered rolling backtests, not random splits.
Calibrate probabilities and evaluate by league, profile, and odds bucket.
Avoid future-information leakage.
Approach or beat the simple market baseline long term before promoting recommendations.
Keep pre-match snapshots; after kickoff only settle and review, never rewrite the original direction.

finalVerdict.zh: 结论必须区分稳妥方向和激进方向；胜平负与让球方向保持一致；数据不足时明确标注，不为推荐而硬推。
finalVerdict.en: The verdict must split conservative and aggressive directions; 1X2 and handicap views must stay consistent; missing data is labelled and no pick is forced.

updateReason.zh: 赛前赔率或让球信号发生实质变化，已生成新的临场预测；开赛后将锁定这版记录。
updateReason.en: Pre-match odds or handicap signals changed materially, so a new late forecast was generated and will be locked after kickoff.

summary.zh: 已记录 54 次官方 SP 快照，胜平负主盘基本没动；这种场次不把静态赔率写成推荐，临场继续看让球盘是否补强。
summary.en: 54 official SP snapshots recorded; the 1X2 board is essentially flat, so a static board is not packaged as a pick. Keep watching handicap confirmation.

explanation.zh: 进球趋势条件未齐：总进球期望约 3.41，大 2.5 概率约 56%，边际不足时不强行给大/小球方向。
explanation.en: The goals trend did not pass the recommendation gate. Total expected goals are about 3.41, over 2.5 probability about 56%, so no over/under pick is promoted.

analysisItems.zh: 比分热区：0-3 附近；候选方向 大2.5球（≥3球） 的模型概率约 56%，低于强推阈值。
analysisItems.en: Score heat zone: around 0-3; candidate Over 2.5 goals is about 56%, below the promotion threshold.

analysisItems.zh: 大 2.5 球概率约 56%，该指标用于走势参考，不等同于官方总进球 SP。
analysisItems.en: Over 2.5 probability is about 56%. This is a model reference, not official Sporttery total-goals SP.

tipLabel.zh: 观察为主 条件未齐

explanation.zh: 这场有正路倾向，但不适合硬写成稳胆。让球同向支持约 39%，风险标签为 胜负接近、让球支持不足、进球临界，先按观察单处理。
explanation.en: There is a favorite lean, but not a banker. same-side handicap support is about 39%; risk tags: Tight 1X2, Handicap support weak, Goal-model borderline. Keep it in watch mode.

analysisItems.zh: 降级原因：模型首选优势约 4 个百分点，未达到强推荐阈值；市场主线领先约 4 个百分点。
analysisItems.en: Downgrade reason: model edge is about 4 points, below the strong-pick threshold; market lead is about 4 points.

analysisItems.zh: 进球侧：比分热区 0-3，总期望 3.41，大 2.5 约 56%，双方进球约 47%。
analysisItems.en: Goals: score heat zone 0-3, total xG 3.41, over 2.5 about 56%, BTTS about 47%.

analysisItems.zh: 临场复核：胜负接近、让球支持不足、进球临界。如果赛前 SP 继续降赔但让球支持不上来，仍按观察处理。
analysisItems.en: Late check: Tight 1X2, Handicap support weak, Goal-model borderline. If SP shortens without handicap confirmation, keep this as watch-only.

dataPolicy.zh: 赛前分析综合官方 HAD/HHAD SP、SP 走势、Elo 强度、近一年攻防样本、赛程密度、比分分布与公开赛前信息层；伤停、首发、天气、裁判、xG/xGA 与外部赔率会按可验证程度进入辅助判断。
dataPolicy.en: Pre-match reads combine official HAD/HHAD SP, SP movement, Elo strength, last-year form, schedule density, score distribution, and public pre-match signal layers. Injuries, lineups, weather, referees, xG/xGA, and external odds are folded in as verified auxiliary inputs.

outputSections.zh: 六、伤停与首发阵容分析
七、战术风格与克制关系分析
八、赛程体能与战意分析
十、天气、场地与裁判因素
十二、综合判断与预测结论

zh: 先输出胜平负、比分分布、大小球、双方进球和让球概率，不把任务简化成只猜胜负。
官方 SP 去水概率是最低基准，Elo 强度、Poisson 比分模型、近一年攻防和赛程密度只在赛前可得时参与集成。
推荐阈值跟随 model-calibration 动态变化；低命中联赛、市场或方向自动降权并提高概率差与让球支持要求。
回测必须按时间滚动，严禁赛后 xG、赛后射门、最终排名、未公开首发或时间点不一致的临场赔率泄漏。
评估以 log loss、Brier score、校准误差和分桶可靠性为主，命中率只作为辅助观察。
en: Output 1X2, score distribution, totals, BTTS, and handicap probabilities first instead of reducing the task to one winner.
Official de-vigged SP is the baseline; Elo, Poisson score modelling, last-year attack/defense form, and schedule density enter only when available before kickoff.
Recommendation gates follow model-calibration dynamically; cold leagues, markets, or directions are down-weighted with higher probability-gap and handicap-support requirements.
Backtests must be time-ordered and must not leak post-match xG, post-match shots, final table rank, unpublished lineups, or late odds into earlier forecast nodes.
Evaluate with log loss, Brier score, calibration error, and bucket reliability; hit rate is only a secondary diagnostic.

forecastTargets.zh: 胜平负：主胜、平局、客胜三项概率
比分分布：2-3 个最高概率比分
大小球：大/小 2.5 概率
双方进球：BTTS Yes/No 概率
让球概率：当前官方让球线支持率
forecastTargets.en: Handicap: support at the current official line

modelingStack.zh: 赔率基准：官方 SP 去水隐含概率
modelingStack.en: Market baseline: de-vigged official SP probabilities

modelingStack.zh: Elo/Glicko 强度：球队动态评分、主场优势和强弱差
modelingStack.en: Elo/Glicko strength: dynamic rating, home advantage, team gap

modelingStack.zh: Poisson/Dixon-Coles：进球期望、比分矩阵、大小球和让球聚合
modelingStack.en: Poisson/Dixon-Coles: goal expectations, score matrix, totals, handicap aggregation

modelingStack.zh: 机器学习层：仅在基准稳定并完成时间滚动回测后加入
modelingStack.en: ML layer: added only after stable baselines and time-ordered backtests

modelingStack.zh: 集成层：用滚动验证集优化 market/Elo/Poisson/ML 权重
modelingStack.en: Ensemble: optimize market/Elo/Poisson/ML weights on rolling validation

modelingStack.zh: 校准层：可靠性曲线、Platt、isotonic、联赛和赔率分桶
modelingStack.en: Calibration: reliability curves, Platt, isotonic, league and odds buckets

zh: 必须输出概率，而不是只输出胜负结论。
必须按时间滚动回测，不能随机切分。
必须校准概率，并按联赛、场景和赔率区间分桶评估。
必须避免未来信息泄漏。
必须长期接近或优于简单赔率基准，否则不升格为推荐。
必须保留赛前快照，赛后只结算和复盘，不改写原方向。
en: Output probabilities, not just a winner.
Use time-ordered rolling backtests, not random splits.
Calibrate probabilities and evaluate by league, profile, and odds bucket.
Avoid future-information leakage.
Approach or beat the simple market baseline long term before promoting recommendations.
Keep pre-match snapshots; after kickoff only settle and review, never rewrite the original direction.

finalVerdict.zh: 结论必须区分稳妥方向和激进方向；胜平负与让球方向保持一致；数据不足时明确标注，不为推荐而硬推。
finalVerdict.en: The verdict must split conservative and aggressive directions; 1X2 and handicap views must stay consistent; missing data is labelled and no pick is forced.

updateReason.zh: 赛前赔率或让球信号发生实质变化，已生成新的临场预测；开赛后将锁定这版记录。
updateReason.en: Pre-match odds or handicap signals changed materially, so a new late forecast was generated and will be locked after kickoff.

basis.zh: 模型按竞彩日归档、按官方开赛时间排序；综合官方 SP/让球 SP/赔率快照、Elo、近一年赛果攻防、赛程密度、Poisson 比分分布与赛前信息层。推荐分为主推候选、价值观察、观察和避坑，低赔强队必须通过让球盘与概率双重校验。
basis.en: Schedules are grouped by Sporttery day and sorted by official kickoff time. The model combines official SP/handicap SP/snapshots, Elo, last-year form, schedule density, Poisson score distribution, and pre-match signal layers. Picks are split into main candidates, value-watch, watch, and avoid; low-SP favourites must pass both handicap and probability checks.

calibration.zh: 当前为轻量级赛前校准：已加入历史 form 修正和近期命中率冷却；后续仍需要用时间滚动回测做 Brier / log loss / reliability 正式校准。
calibration.en: This is a lightweight pre-match calibration with rolling-form correction and recent hit-rate cooldown; Brier, log loss, and reliability calibration are still needed.

tipLabel.zh: 观察为主 胜平负不强推

explanation.zh: 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负条件未齐：低赔、平局压力、让球确认或风险标签存在不一致，只保留为赛前观察项。
explanation.en: This 1X2 market did not pass the recommendation gate. Low odds, draw pressure, handicap confirmation, or risk tags are not aligned, so it remains watch-only.

analysisItems.zh: 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负 SP：主胜 1.34 / 平局 3.92 / 客胜 7.85；去水支持率约 主胜 66% / 平局 23% / 客胜 11%。
analysisItems.en: official Sporttery HAD SP: 1.34 / 3.92 / 7.85; normalized support is about home 66% / draw 23% / away 11%.

analysisItems.zh: 观察理由：模型优势约 12 个百分点，市场优势约 44 个百分点，让球同向支持约 27%；条件没有同时闭合，暂不输出单一胜平负方向。
analysisItems.en: Watch reason: model edge is about 12 points, market edge about 44 points, same-side handicap support about 27%; no single 1X2 pick is promoted.

analysisItems.zh: 平局支持率未明显压低主方向，但仍需留意赛前 SP 变化。 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负 SP 来自本次中国竞彩网同步快照。
analysisItems.en: Draw support is not dominant, but late SP movement still matters. official Sporttery HAD SP came from this Sporttery sync snapshot.

tipLabel.zh: 观察为主 进球数不强推

explanation.zh: 进球趋势条件未齐：总进球期望约 2.74，大 2.5 概率约 51%，边际不足时不强行给大/小球方向。
explanation.en: The goals trend did not pass the recommendation gate. Total expected goals are about 2.74, over 2.5 probability about 51%, so no over/under pick is promoted.

analysisItems.zh: 比分热区：2-0 附近；候选方向 小2.5球（≤2球） 的模型概率约 49%，低于强推阈值。
analysisItems.en: Score heat zone: around 2-0; candidate Under 2.5 goals is about 49%, below the promotion threshold.

analysisItems.zh: 大 2.5 球概率约 51%，该指标用于走势参考，不等同于官方总进球 SP。
analysisItems.en: Over 2.5 probability is about 51%. This is a model reference, not official Sporttery total-goals SP.

tipLabel.zh: 观察为主 条件未齐

explanation.zh: 模型没有否定防平参考 平局，只是拒绝把它抬到主推：市场第一方向领先 44 个百分点，但让球验证和风险项还没闭合。
explanation.en: The model is not rejecting draw-cover reference Draw; it is refusing to upgrade it. Market lead is 44 points, but handicap and risk checks are not closed.

analysisItems.zh: 降级原因：风险标签叠加为 进球临界、盘口分歧，当前不适合只给单一方向。
analysisItems.en: Downgrade reason: risk tags overlap: Goal-model borderline, Market disagreement. A single pick is not justified yet.

analysisItems.zh: 进球侧：比分热区 2-0，总期望 2.74，大 2.5 约 51%，双方进球约 48%。
analysisItems.en: Goals: score heat zone 2-0, total xG 2.74, over 2.5 about 51%, BTTS about 48%.

analysisItems.zh: 临场复核：进球临界、盘口分歧。如果赛前 SP 继续降赔但让球支持不上来，仍按观察处理。
analysisItems.en: Late check: Goal-model borderline, Market disagreement. If SP shortens without handicap confirmation, keep this as watch-only.

dataPolicy.en: Pre-match reads combine official HAD/HHAD SP, SP movement, Elo strength, last-year form, schedule density, score distribution, and public pre-match signal layers. Injuries, lineups, weather, referees, xG/xGA, and external odds are folded in as verified auxiliary inputs.

outputSections.zh: 六、伤停与首发阵容分析
七、战术风格与克制关系分析

zh: 先输出胜平负、比分分布、大小球、双方进球和让球概率，不把任务简化成只猜胜负。
官方 SP 去水概率是最低基准，Elo 强度、Poisson 比分模型、近一年攻防和赛程密度只在赛前可得时参与集成。
推荐阈值跟随 model-calibration 动态变化；低命中联赛、市场或方向自动降权并提高概率差与让球支持要求。
回测必须按时间滚动，严禁赛后 xG、赛后射门、最终排名、未公开首发或时间点不一致的临场赔率泄漏。
评估以 log loss、Brier score、校准误差和分桶可靠性为主，命中率只作为辅助观察。
en: Output 1X2, score distribution, totals, BTTS, and handicap probabilities first instead of reducing the task to one winner.
Official de-vigged SP is the baseline; Elo, Poisson score modelling, last-year attack/defense form, and schedule density enter only when available before kickoff.
Recommendation gates follow model-calibration dynamically; cold leagues, markets, or directions are down-weighted with higher probability-gap and handicap-support requirements.
Backtests must be time-ordered and must not leak post-match xG, post-match shots, final table rank, unpublished lineups, or late odds into earlier forecast nodes.
Evaluate with log loss, Brier score, calibration error, and bucket reliability; hit rate is only a secondary diagnostic.

双方进球：BTTS Yes/No 概率

forecastTargets.en: Handicap: support at the current official line

modelingStack.en: Market baseline: de-vigged official SP probabilities

modelingStack.en: Elo/Glicko strength: dynamic rating, home advantage, team gap

modelingStack.zh: Poisson/Dixon-Coles：进球期望、比分矩阵、大小球和让球聚合
modelingStack.en: Poisson/Dixon-Coles: goal expectations, score matrix, totals, handicap aggregation

modelingStack.zh: 机器学习层：仅在基准稳定并完成时间滚动回测后加入
modelingStack.en: ML layer: added only after stable baselines and time-ordered backtests

modelingStack.zh: 集成层：用滚动验证集优化 market/Elo/Poisson/ML 权重
modelingStack.en: Ensemble: optimize market/Elo/Poisson/ML weights on rolling validation

modelingStack.zh: 校准层：可靠性曲线、Platt、isotonic、联赛和赔率分桶
modelingStack.en: Calibration: reliability curves, Platt, isotonic, league and odds buckets

zh: 必须输出概率，而不是只输出胜负结论。
必须按时间滚动回测，不能随机切分。
必须校准概率，并按联赛、场景和赔率区间分桶评估。
必须避免未来信息泄漏。
必须长期接近或优于简单赔率基准，否则不升格为推荐。
必须保留赛前快照，赛后只结算和复盘，不改写原方向。
en: Output probabilities, not just a winner.
Use time-ordered rolling backtests, not random splits.
Calibrate probabilities and evaluate by league, profile, and odds bucket.
Avoid future-information leakage.
Approach or beat the simple market baseline long term before promoting recommendations.
Keep pre-match snapshots; after kickoff only settle and review, never rewrite the original direction.

finalVerdict.zh: 结论必须区分稳妥方向和激进方向；胜平负与让球方向保持一致；数据不足时明确标注，不为推荐而硬推。
finalVerdict.en: The verdict must split conservative and aggressive directions; 1X2 and handicap views must stay consistent; missing data is labelled and no pick is forced.

tipLabel.zh: 让球主胜 卡塔尔

analysisItems.zh: 胜平负差距：市场主线领先第二方向约 12 个百分点，当前模型可信度 51%。

analysisItems.zh: 平局支持率未明显压低主方向，但仍需留意赛前 SP 变化。 官方 HHAD 让球胜平负(+2.00) SP 来自本次中国竞彩网同步快照。
analysisItems.en: Draw support is not dominant, but late SP movement still matters. official Sporttery HHAD (+2.00) SP came from this Sporttery sync snapshot.

tipLabel.zh: 观察为主 进球数不强推

analysisItems.zh: 大 2.5 球概率约 50%，该指标用于走势参考，不等同于官方总进球 SP。

tipLabel.zh: 模型首选 让球主胜 卡塔尔

analysisItems.zh: 进球侧：比分热区 1-1，总期望 2.64，大 2.5 约 50%，双方进球约 51%。
analysisItems.en: Goals: score heat zone 1-1, total xG 2.64, over 2.5 about 50%, BTTS about 51%.

analysisItems.zh: 观察点：进球临界；若临场 SP 与让球盘分歧扩大，不建议强行升档。
analysisItems.en: Watch point: Goal-model borderline. If late SP and handicap diverge further, do not upgrade it.

zh: 先输出胜平负、比分分布、大小球、双方进球和让球概率，不把任务简化成只猜胜负。
官方 SP 去水概率是最低基准，Elo 强度、Poisson 比分模型、近一年攻防和赛程密度只在赛前可得时参与集成。
推荐阈值跟随 model-calibration 动态变化；低命中联赛、市场或方向自动降权并提高概率差与让球支持要求。
回测必须按时间滚动，严禁赛后 xG、赛后射门、最终排名、未公开首发或时间点不一致的临场赔率泄漏。
评估以 log loss、Brier score、校准误差和分桶可靠性为主，命中率只作为辅助观察。
en: Output 1X2, score distribution, totals, BTTS, and handicap probabilities first instead of reducing the task to one winner.
Official de-vigged SP is the baseline; Elo, Poisson score modelling, last-year attack/defense form, and schedule density enter only when available before kickoff.
Recommendation gates follow model-calibration dynamically; cold leagues, markets, or directions are down-weighted with higher probability-gap and handicap-support requirements.
Backtests must be time-ordered and must not leak post-match xG, post-match shots, final table rank, unpublished lineups, or late odds into earlier forecast nodes.
Evaluate with log loss, Brier score, calibration error, and bucket reliability; hit rate is only a secondary diagnostic.

zh: 必须输出概率，而不是只输出胜负结论。

必须避免未来信息泄漏。
必须长期接近或优于简单赔率基准，否则不升格为推荐。
必须保留赛前快照，赛后只结算和复盘，不改写原方向。
en: Output probabilities, not just a winner.
Use time-ordered rolling backtests, not random splits.

Avoid future-information leakage.
Approach or beat the simple market baseline long term before promoting recommendations.
Keep pre-match snapshots; after kickoff only settle and review, never rewrite the original direction.

zh: 先输出胜平负、比分分布、大小球、双方进球和让球概率，不把任务简化成只猜胜负。
官方 SP 去水概率是最低基准，Elo 强度、Poisson 比分模型、近一年攻防和赛程密度只在赛前可得时参与集成。
推荐阈值跟随 model-calibration 动态变化；低命中联赛、市场或方向自动降权并提高概率差与让球支持要求。
回测必须按时间滚动，严禁赛后 xG、赛后射门、最终排名、未公开首发或时间点不一致的临场赔率泄漏。
评估以 log loss、Brier score、校准误差和分桶可靠性为主，命中率只作为辅助观察。
en: Output 1X2, score distribution, totals, BTTS, and handicap probabilities first instead of reducing the task to one winner.
Official de-vigged SP is the baseline; Elo, Poisson score modelling, last-year attack/defense form, and schedule density enter only when available before kickoff.
Recommendation gates follow model-calibration dynamically; cold leagues, markets, or directions are down-weighted with higher probability-gap and handicap-support requirements.
Backtests must be time-ordered and must not leak post-match xG, post-match shots, final table rank, unpublished lineups, or late odds into earlier forecast nodes.
Evaluate with log loss, Brier score, calibration error, and bucket reliability; hit rate is only a secondary diagnostic.

zh: 必须输出概率，而不是只输出胜负结论。

en: Output probabilities, not just a winner.

Avoid future-information leakage.
Approach or beat the simple market baseline long term before promoting recommendations.
Keep pre-match snapshots; after kickoff only settle and review, never rewrite the original direction.

finalVerdict.en: The verdict must split conservative and aggressive directions; 1X2 and handicap views must stay consistent; missing data is labelled and no pick is forced.

官方 SP 去水概率是最低基准，Elo 强度、Poisson 比分模型、近一年攻防和赛程密度只在赛前可得时参与集成。
推荐阈值跟随 model-calibration 动态变化；低命中联赛、市场或方向自动降权并提高概率差与让球支持要求。
回测必须按时间滚动，严禁赛后 xG、赛后射门、最终排名、未公开首发或时间点不一致的临场赔率泄漏。
评估以 log loss、Brier score、校准误差和分桶可靠性为主，命中率只作为辅助观察。
en: Output 1X2, score distribution, totals, BTTS, and handicap probabilities first instead of reducing the task to one winner.
Official de-vigged SP is the baseline; Elo, Poisson score modelling, last-year attack/defense form, and schedule density enter only when available before kickoff.
Recommendation gates follow model-calibration dynamically; cold leagues, markets, or directions are down-weighted with higher probability-gap and handicap-support requirements.
Backtests must be time-ordered and must not leak post-match xG, post-match shots, final table rank, unpublished lineups, or late odds into earlier forecast nodes.
Evaluate with log loss, Brier score, calibration error, and bucket reliability; hit rate is only a secondary diagnostic.

forecastTargets.zh: 胜平负：主胜、平局、客胜三项概率
比分分布：2-3 个最高概率比分
大小球：大/小 2.5 概率
双方进球：BTTS Yes/No 概率
让球概率：当前官方让球线支持率
forecastTargets.en: Handicap: support at the current official line

modelingStack.zh: 赔率基准：官方 SP 去水隐含概率
modelingStack.en: Market baseline: de-vigged official SP probabilities

modelingStack.zh: Elo/Glicko 强度：球队动态评分、主场优势和强弱差
modelingStack.en: Elo/Glicko strength: dynamic rating, home advantage, team gap

modelingStack.zh: Poisson/Dixon-Coles：进球期望、比分矩阵、大小球和让球聚合
modelingStack.en: Poisson/Dixon-Coles: goal expectations, score matrix, totals, handicap aggregation

modelingStack.zh: 机器学习层：仅在基准稳定并完成时间滚动回测后加入
modelingStack.en: ML layer: added only after stable baselines and time-ordered backtests

modelingStack.zh: 集成层：用滚动验证集优化 market/Elo/Poisson/ML 权重
modelingStack.en: Ensemble: optimize market/Elo/Poisson/ML weights on rolling validation

modelingStack.zh: 校准层：可靠性曲线、Platt、isotonic、联赛和赔率分桶
modelingStack.en: Calibration: reliability curves, Platt, isotonic, league and odds buckets

zh: 必须输出概率，而不是只输出胜负结论。
必须按时间滚动回测，不能随机切分。
必须校准概率，并按联赛、场景和赔率区间分桶评估。
必须避免未来信息泄漏。
必须长期接近或优于简单赔率基准，否则不升格为推荐。
必须保留赛前快照，赛后只结算和复盘，不改写原方向。
en: Output probabilities, not just a winner.
Use time-ordered rolling backtests, not random splits.
Calibrate probabilities and evaluate by league, profile, and odds bucket.
Avoid future-information leakage.
Approach or beat the simple market baseline long term before promoting recommendations.
Keep pre-match snapshots; after kickoff only settle and review, never rewrite the original direction.

finalVerdict.zh: 结论必须区分稳妥方向和激进方向；胜平负与让球方向保持一致；数据不足时明确标注，不为推荐而硬推。
finalVerdict.en: The verdict must split conservative and aggressive directions; 1X2 and handicap views must stay consistent; missing data is labelled and no pick is forced.

updateReason.zh: 赛前赔率或让球信号发生实质变化，已生成新的临场预测；开赛后将锁定这版记录。
updateReason.en: Pre-match odds or handicap signals changed materially, so a new late forecast was generated and will be locked after kickoff.

basis.zh: 模型按竞彩日归档、按官方开赛时间排序；综合官方 SP/让球 SP/赔率快照、Elo、近一年赛果攻防、赛程密度、Poisson 比分分布与赛前信息层。推荐分为主推候选、价值观察、观察和避坑，低赔强队必须通过让球盘与概率双重校验。
basis.en: Schedules are grouped by Sporttery day and sorted by official kickoff time. The model combines official SP/handicap SP/snapshots, Elo, last-year form, schedule density, Poisson score distribution, and pre-match signal layers. Picks are split into main candidates, value-watch, watch, and avoid; low-SP favourites must pass both handicap and probability checks.

calibration.zh: 当前为轻量级赛前校准：已加入历史 form 修正和近期命中率冷却；后续仍需要用时间滚动回测做 Brier / log loss / reliability 正式校准。
calibration.en: This is a lightweight pre-match calibration with rolling-form correction and recent hit-rate cooldown; Brier, log loss, and reliability calibration are still needed.

tipLabel.zh: 观察为主 胜平负不强推

explanation.zh: 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负条件未齐：低赔、平局压力、让球确认或风险标签存在不一致，只保留为赛前观察项。
explanation.en: This 1X2 market did not pass the recommendation gate. Low odds, draw pressure, handicap confirmation, or risk tags are not aligned, so it remains watch-only.

analysisItems.zh: 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负 SP：主胜 1.46 / 平局 3.65 / 客胜 5.85；去水支持率约 主胜 61% / 平局 24% / 客胜 15%。

analysisItems.zh: 观察理由：模型优势约 9 个百分点，市场优势约 36 个百分点，让球同向支持约 28%；条件没有同时闭合，暂不输出单一胜平负方向。
analysisItems.en: Watch reason: model edge is about 9 points, market edge about 36 points, same-side handicap support about 28%; no single 1X2 pick is promoted.

analysisItems.zh: 平局支持率未明显压低主方向，但仍需留意赛前 SP 变化。 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负 SP 来自本次中国竞彩网同步快照。
analysisItems.en: Draw support is not dominant, but late SP movement still matters. official Sporttery HAD SP came from this Sporttery sync snapshot.

tipLabel.zh: 观察为主 进球数不强推

explanation.zh: 进球趋势条件未齐：总进球期望约 2.72，大 2.5 概率约 50%，边际不足时不强行给大/小球方向。
explanation.en: The goals trend did not pass the recommendation gate. Total expected goals are about 2.72, over 2.5 probability about 50%, so no over/under pick is promoted.

analysisItems.zh: 比分热区：2-0 附近；候选方向 小2.5球（≤2球） 的模型概率约 50%，低于强推阈值。

analysisItems.zh: 大 2.5 球概率约 50%，该指标用于走势参考，不等同于官方总进球 SP。
analysisItems.en: Over 2.5 probability is about 50%. This is a model reference, not official Sporttery total-goals SP.

tipLabel.zh: 观察为主 条件未齐

explanation.zh: 这场先不把防平参考 平局包装成主推。它的意义是提醒防平/防冷，主盘与让球盘还没有形成完整共振。
explanation.en: This is not packaged as a main pick. draw-cover reference Draw is used as draw/upset protection because 1X2 and handicap are not fully aligned.

analysisItems.zh: 降级原因：风险标签叠加为 进球临界、盘口分歧，当前不适合只给单一方向。
analysisItems.en: Downgrade reason: risk tags overlap: Goal-model borderline, Market disagreement. A single pick is not justified yet.

analysisItems.zh: 进球侧：比分热区 2-0，总期望 2.72，大 2.5 约 50%，双方进球约 48%。
analysisItems.en: Goals: score heat zone 2-0, total xG 2.72, over 2.5 about 50%, BTTS about 48%.

analysisItems.zh: 临场复核：进球临界、盘口分歧。如果赛前 SP 继续降赔但让球支持不上来，仍按观察处理。
analysisItems.en: Late check: Goal-model borderline, Market disagreement. If SP shortens without handicap confirmation, keep this as watch-only.

dataPolicy.zh: 赛前分析综合官方 HAD/HHAD SP、SP 走势、Elo 强度、近一年攻防样本、赛程密度、比分分布与公开赛前信息层；伤停、首发、天气、裁判、xG/xGA 与外部赔率会按可验证程度进入辅助判断。

必须按时间滚动回测，不能随机切分。

必须避免未来信息泄漏。
必须长期接近或优于简单赔率基准，否则不升格为推荐。

en: Output probabilities, not just a winner.
Use time-ordered rolling backtests, not random splits.
Calibrate probabilities and evaluate by league, profile, and odds bucket.
Avoid future-information leakage.
Approach or beat the simple market baseline long term before promoting recommendations.
Keep pre-match snapshots; after kickoff only settle and review, never rewrite the original direction.

finalVerdict.zh: 结论必须区分稳妥方向和激进方向；胜平负与让球方向保持一致；数据不足时明确标注，不为推荐而硬推。
finalVerdict.en: The verdict must split conservative and aggressive directions; 1X2 and handicap views must stay consistent; missing data is labelled and no pick is forced.

updateReason.zh: 赛前赔率或让球信号发生实质变化，已生成新的临场预测；开赛后将锁定这版记录。
updateReason.en: Pre-match odds or handicap signals changed materially, so a new late forecast was generated and will be locked after kickoff.

summary.zh: 已记录 54 次官方 SP 快照，胜平负主盘基本没动；这种场次不把静态赔率写成推荐，临场继续看让球盘是否补强。
summary.en: 54 official SP snapshots recorded; the 1X2 board is essentially flat, so a static board is not packaged as a pick. Keep watching handicap confirmation.

basis.zh: 模型按竞彩日归档、按官方开赛时间排序；综合官方 SP/让球 SP/赔率快照、Elo、近一年赛果攻防、赛程密度、Poisson 比分分布与赛前信息层。推荐分为主推候选、价值观察、观察和避坑，低赔强队必须通过让球盘与概率双重校验。
basis.en: Schedules are grouped by Sporttery day and sorted by official kickoff time. The model combines official SP/handicap SP/snapshots, Elo, last-year form, schedule density, Poisson score distribution, and pre-match signal layers. Picks are split into main candidates, value-watch, watch, and avoid; low-SP favourites must pass both handicap and probability checks.

calibration.zh: 当前为轻量级赛前校准：已加入历史 form 修正和近期命中率冷却；后续仍需要用时间滚动回测做 Brier / log loss / reliability 正式校准。
calibration.en: This is a lightweight pre-match calibration with rolling-form correction and recent hit-rate cooldown; Brier, log loss, and reliability calibration are still needed.

tipLabel.zh: 观察为主 胜平负不强推

explanation.zh: 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负条件未齐：低赔、平局压力、让球确认或风险标签存在不一致，只保留为赛前观察项。
explanation.en: This 1X2 market did not pass the recommendation gate. Low odds, draw pressure, handicap confirmation, or risk tags are not aligned, so it remains watch-only.

analysisItems.zh: 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负 SP：主胜 1.56 / 平局 3.30 / 客胜 5.40；去水支持率约 主胜 57% / 平局 27% / 客胜 16%。
analysisItems.en: official Sporttery HAD SP: 1.56 / 3.30 / 5.40; normalized support is about home 57% / draw 27% / away 16%.

analysisItems.zh: 观察理由：模型优势约 3 个百分点，市场优势约 30 个百分点，让球同向支持约 29%；条件没有同时闭合，暂不输出单一胜平负方向。
analysisItems.en: Watch reason: model edge is about 3 points, market edge about 30 points, same-side handicap support about 29%; no single 1X2 pick is promoted.

analysisItems.zh: 平局支持率未明显压低主方向，但仍需留意赛前 SP 变化。 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负 SP 来自本次中国竞彩网同步快照。
analysisItems.en: Draw support is not dominant, but late SP movement still matters. official Sporttery HAD SP came from this Sporttery sync snapshot.

tipLabel.zh: 观察为主 进球数不强推

explanation.zh: 进球趋势条件未齐：总进球期望约 2.69，大 2.5 概率约 50%，边际不足时不强行给大/小球方向。
explanation.en: The goals trend did not pass the recommendation gate. Total expected goals are about 2.69, over 2.5 probability about 50%, so no over/under pick is promoted.

analysisItems.zh: 比分热区：1-0 附近；候选方向 小2.5球（≤2球） 的模型概率约 50%，低于强推阈值。
analysisItems.en: Score heat zone: around 1-0; candidate Under 2.5 goals is about 50%, below the promotion threshold.

analysisItems.zh: 大 2.5 球概率约 50%，该指标用于走势参考，不等同于官方总进球 SP。
analysisItems.en: Over 2.5 probability is about 50%. This is a model reference, not official Sporttery total-goals SP.

tipLabel.zh: 观察为主 条件未齐

explanation.zh: 这场先不把防平参考 平局包装成主推。它的意义是提醒防平/防冷，主盘与让球盘还没有形成完整共振。
explanation.en: This is not packaged as a main pick. draw-cover reference Draw is used as draw/upset protection because 1X2 and handicap are not fully aligned.

analysisItems.zh: 降级原因：风险标签叠加为 进球临界、盘口分歧，当前不适合只给单一方向。
analysisItems.en: Downgrade reason: risk tags overlap: Goal-model borderline, Market disagreement. A single pick is not justified yet.

analysisItems.zh: 进球侧：比分热区 1-0，总期望 2.69，大 2.5 约 50%，双方进球约 49%。
analysisItems.en: Goals: score heat zone 1-0, total xG 2.69, over 2.5 about 50%, BTTS about 49%.

analysisItems.zh: 临场复核：进球临界、盘口分歧。如果赛前 SP 继续降赔但让球支持不上来，仍按观察处理。
analysisItems.en: Late check: Goal-model borderline, Market disagreement. If SP shortens without handicap confirmation, keep this as watch-only.

dataPolicy.zh: 赛前分析综合官方 HAD/HHAD SP、SP 走势、Elo 强度、近一年攻防样本、赛程密度、比分分布与公开赛前信息层；伤停、首发、天气、裁判、xG/xGA 与外部赔率会按可验证程度进入辅助判断。
dataPolicy.en: Pre-match reads combine official HAD/HHAD SP, SP movement, Elo strength, last-year form, schedule density, score distribution, and public pre-match signal layers. Injuries, lineups, weather, referees, xG/xGA, and external odds are folded in as verified auxiliary inputs.

zh: 先输出胜平负、比分分布、大小球、双方进球和让球概率，不把任务简化成只猜胜负。
官方 SP 去水概率是最低基准，Elo 强度、Poisson 比分模型、近一年攻防和赛程密度只在赛前可得时参与集成。
推荐阈值跟随 model-calibration 动态变化；低命中联赛、市场或方向自动降权并提高概率差与让球支持要求。
回测必须按时间滚动，严禁赛后 xG、赛后射门、最终排名、未公开首发或时间点不一致的临场赔率泄漏。
评估以 log loss、Brier score、校准误差和分桶可靠性为主，命中率只作为辅助观察。
en: Output 1X2, score distribution, totals, BTTS, and handicap probabilities first instead of reducing the task to one winner.
Official de-vigged SP is the baseline; Elo, Poisson score modelling, last-year attack/defense form, and schedule density enter only when available before kickoff.
Recommendation gates follow model-calibration dynamically; cold leagues, markets, or directions are down-weighted with higher probability-gap and handicap-support requirements.
Backtests must be time-ordered and must not leak post-match xG, post-match shots, final table rank, unpublished lineups, or late odds into earlier forecast nodes.
Evaluate with log loss, Brier score, calibration error, and bucket reliability; hit rate is only a secondary diagnostic.

zh: 先输出胜平负、比分分布、大小球、双方进球和让球概率，不把任务简化成只猜胜负。

en: Output 1X2, score distribution, totals, BTTS, and handicap probabilities first instead of reducing the task to one winner.
Official de-vigged SP is the baseline; Elo, Poisson score modelling, last-year attack/defense form, and schedule density enter only when available before kickoff.
Recommendation gates follow model-calibration dynamically; cold leagues, markets, or directions are down-weighted with higher probability-gap and handicap-support requirements.
Backtests must be time-ordered and must not leak post-match xG, post-match shots, final table rank, unpublished lineups, or late odds into earlier forecast nodes.
Evaluate with log loss, Brier score, calibration error, and bucket reliability; hit rate is only a secondary diagnostic.

zh: 必须输出概率，而不是只输出胜负结论。

必须避免未来信息泄漏。

zh: 先输出胜平负、比分分布、大小球、双方进球和让球概率，不把任务简化成只猜胜负。
官方 SP 去水概率是最低基准，Elo 强度、Poisson 比分模型、近一年攻防和赛程密度只在赛前可得时参与集成。
推荐阈值跟随 model-calibration 动态变化；低命中联赛、市场或方向自动降权并提高概率差与让球支持要求。
回测必须按时间滚动，严禁赛后 xG、赛后射门、最终排名、未公开首发或时间点不一致的临场赔率泄漏。
评估以 log loss、Brier score、校准误差和分桶可靠性为主，命中率只作为辅助观察。
en: Output 1X2, score distribution, totals, BTTS, and handicap probabilities first instead of reducing the task to one winner.
Official de-vigged SP is the baseline; Elo, Poisson score modelling, last-year attack/defense form, and schedule density enter only when available before kickoff.
Recommendation gates follow model-calibration dynamically; cold leagues, markets, or directions are down-weighted with higher probability-gap and handicap-support requirements.
Backtests must be time-ordered and must not leak post-match xG, post-match shots, final table rank, unpublished lineups, or late odds into earlier forecast nodes.
Evaluate with log loss, Brier score, calibration error, and bucket reliability; hit rate is only a secondary diagnostic.

zh: 必须输出概率，而不是只输出胜负结论。

Avoid future-information leakage.

Keep pre-match snapshots; after kickoff only settle and review, never rewrite the original direction.

zh: 先输出胜平负、比分分布、大小球、双方进球和让球概率，不把任务简化成只猜胜负。
官方 SP 去水概率是最低基准，Elo 强度、Poisson 比分模型、近一年攻防和赛程密度只在赛前可得时参与集成。

回测必须按时间滚动，严禁赛后 xG、赛后射门、最终排名、未公开首发或时间点不一致的临场赔率泄漏。
评估以 log loss、Brier score、校准误差和分桶可靠性为主，命中率只作为辅助观察。
en: Output 1X2, score distribution, totals, BTTS, and handicap probabilities first instead of reducing the task to one winner.
Official de-vigged SP is the baseline; Elo, Poisson score modelling, last-year attack/defense form, and schedule density enter only when available before kickoff.
Recommendation gates follow model-calibration dynamically; cold leagues, markets, or directions are down-weighted with higher probability-gap and handicap-support requirements.
Backtests must be time-ordered and must not leak post-match xG, post-match shots, final table rank, unpublished lineups, or late odds into earlier forecast nodes.
Evaluate with log loss, Brier score, calibration error, and bucket reliability; hit rate is only a secondary diagnostic.

modelingStack.en: Ensemble: optimize market/Elo/Poisson/ML weights on rolling validation

modelingStack.zh: 校准层：可靠性曲线、Platt、isotonic、联赛和赔率分桶
modelingStack.en: Calibration: reliability curves, Platt, isotonic, league and odds buckets

zh: 必须输出概率，而不是只输出胜负结论。
必须按时间滚动回测，不能随机切分。
必须校准概率，并按联赛、场景和赔率区间分桶评估。
必须避免未来信息泄漏。
必须长期接近或优于简单赔率基准，否则不升格为推荐。
必须保留赛前快照，赛后只结算和复盘，不改写原方向。
en: Output probabilities, not just a winner.
Use time-ordered rolling backtests, not random splits.
Calibrate probabilities and evaluate by league, profile, and odds bucket.
Avoid future-information leakage.
Approach or beat the simple market baseline long term before promoting recommendations.
Keep pre-match snapshots; after kickoff only settle and review, never rewrite the original direction.

finalVerdict.zh: 结论必须区分稳妥方向和激进方向；胜平负与让球方向保持一致；数据不足时明确标注，不为推荐而硬推。
finalVerdict.en: The verdict must split conservative and aggressive directions; 1X2 and handicap views must stay consistent; missing data is labelled and no pick is forced.

updateReason.zh: 赛前赔率或让球信号发生实质变化，已生成新的临场预测；开赛后将锁定这版记录。
updateReason.en: Pre-match odds or handicap signals changed materially, so a new late forecast was generated and will be locked after kickoff.

summary.zh: 已记录 54 次官方 SP 快照，胜平负主盘基本没动；这种场次不把静态赔率写成推荐，临场继续看让球盘是否补强。
summary.en: 54 official SP snapshots recorded; the 1X2 board is essentially flat, so a static board is not packaged as a pick. Keep watching handicap confirmation.
